description: Register a new voice engine or update an existing voice profile for a tenant. Covers both TTS engine registration and operator voice sample ingestion.

engine_id.description: Unique identifier for the voice engine (e.g. mlx_tts, openai_tts, elevenlabs).

operator_voice_sample_path.description: Local path to an audio file for voice cloning. Leave empty to skip voice profile learning.

set_as_default.description: Set this engine as the default for the tenant.

notes: Voice sample ingestion requires the voice-actuator build to be present at dist/libs/actuators/voice-actuator/src/.
